title: Buffing Polishing Pads, SPTA 5Pcs 6.5 Inch Face for 6 Inch 150mm Backing Plate Mix Cutting Force Buffing Pads Cutting Polishing Pad Kit for Car Buffer Polisher Compounding,Polishing, Waxing-SQMIX65
features: [T120 Heavy-Cut Polishing Foam Pad]: T120 Green Heavy-Cut Polishing Foam Pad To Remove 1200/1500# Sanding Disc Marks, Deep Scratches, Overspray, Orange Peel & Heavy Oxidation Work SPTA Heavy Cut Polishing Compound, Ideal For Roatary Polisher.

[T80 High-Cut Foam Polishing Pad]: T80 Yellow High-Cut Foam Pad Is Intensive Cutting Swirl-Free Polishing Pad, It's Remove 1500/2000# Sanding Disc Marks, Swirl Marks & Heavy / Medium Oxidation, Can Work With SPTA Heavy Cut Polishing Compound And Medium Cut Polishing Compoun. Ideal For RO, DA And GA Car Polisher.

[Blue T60 Moderate-Cut Foam Polishing Pads]: T60 Blue Moderate-Cut Foam Pad Can Remove 1500/2000# Sanding Disc Marks & Medium Oxidation, It's Can Work With SPTA Heavy Cut Polishing Compound And Medium Cut Polishing Compound, Ideal For RO,DA And GA Car polisher.

[T40 Orange Medium-Cut Polishing Pad]: T40 Orange Medium-Cut Foam Pad is Light Cutting Pad, It's Can Remove 2000# Sanding Disc Marks, Fine Scratches & Light Oxidation, It's Can Work With SPTA Medium Cut Polishing Compound ,Ideal For Rotary And DA Car Polisher.

[Red T10 Ultra-Fine Finishing Polishing Pad]: T10 Red Ultra-Fine Finishing Foam Pad is Swirl-Free, Gloss Finish Polish Pad, It's Can Remove Car Wash Scratches & Ultra-Fine Swirl Marks, It's Can Work With SPTA Finish Polishing Compound, Ideal For Rotary & DA Polishers.

[Unique Design]: Different size for two sides of the pad---front 6.5 inch (165mm), Back is 6 inch (150mm)---a specicial design to protect surface from being scratched while polishing, to reduce the abrasion for both pad itself, plate and surface. and it has wider compatibility for most type of compounds compare to other shape of pads such as honeycomb, waffle or diamond shape. Great choice to achieve the ideal polishing results.

[High Quatlity]: Prime quality, sponge pad, bendable, washable and reusable. Used for all kinds of coat paints waxing, polishing ,and sealing glaze, to clean and improve their lightness. The biggest advantage for our pads is to lock and remain polishing compound (prevent falling off in high speed). And they have great capacity of heat dissipation.

[Advanced Manufacturing Technology]: Soft and fine workmanship, not damage the surface,Washable and save money. They are light weight and really easy to assemble. made of durable open cell foam which improves airflow, bring out the highest level showcar of shine with the ultra-smooth finishing polish pads,It lasts 4-5 cars polishing or more. It’s washable, reusable and durable. Never fall apart under the high shear force generated by the DA or RO polisher.

[Easy To Use]: Can be used in electric buffer such as Dual Action Polisher, Rotary Polisher, Pneumatic Polisher, Random Orbital Sander and Other Polisher. Used for Auto car detail polishing. With hook and loop backing, you can easily change the sponge. They are suggested to be washed with clean water and dried naturally after using (You also can use SPTA Polishing Pad Condition Brush To Clean the Pads. This Sets also good for Polishing resin products, tables, and floors.

[Buy With Confidence]: Thank you for your great support on us. Product quality and customer satisfaction is our top priority. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us, we will provide the best service as we can.
